nodes.label: Home Screen — Active State with App Blocker Check

properties.greeting: Buenas tardes, Juan, ¿Listo para tu ritual de hoy?
properties.description: Home screen in active state showing the 'Mejora tu concentración' section listing distracting apps (Instagram, TikTok, YouTube, Facebook) with individual toggle switches. A developer overlay panel 'Mentex Tweaks' is visible on the right with controls for AUTH, ESTADO (Inactivo/Activo), ACENTO (color picker, teal active), ESTILO DE CARDS (Tarjetas/Glass/Líneas/Plano), TIPOGRAFÍA (Geist/Inter/Manrope).

nodes.label: App Blocker — Distraction App List with Toggles

properties.description: List component within Home showing distracting social-media/video apps each with an icon, name, and a toggle to enable blocking. A bottom CTA 'Agregar más' allows adding more apps.

controls.AUTH_DEV: auth shortcuts (Welcome skip splash, Login screen)

properties.description: A developer overlay/debug panel floating on the right side of the screen providing runtime theme and state controls: auth navigation shortcuts, active/inactive toggle, accent color picker, card style variants, and typography family selector.

nodes.label: Mentex Tweaks Panel — Shared Dev Overlay (All Screens)

properties.description: The Mentex Tweaks developer panel appears consistently across all four screenshots as a floating right-side overlay, confirming it is a persistent global dev tool not specific to any single screen. Its controls (AUTH, ESTADO, ACENTO, ESTILO DE CARDS, TIPOGRAFÍA) affect the entire app.
